_doc: Single source of truth for the MLX Granite models Cloud2Ground supports. Edit THIS FILE when a model name changes or a new tier is added — watch_mlx_v2.sh, the Setup Wizard (MLXModels.swift), and the LaunchAgent plist all read the default from here (directly, or via a synced copy) instead of hand-copying model ids. Canonical copy: mlx_poc/mlx_models.json. Cloud2Ground/Cloud2Ground/mlx_models.json is a bundled mirror for the Xcode app — kept in sync by hand, same convention already used for SKILL-MLX.md's three deployed copies (outer skill/, bundled Cloud2Ground copy, live ~/.claude/skills/mlx-delegate/ copy). WatcherScriptInstaller copies the bundled mirror to the installed watcher directory so the production script's co-located lookup works the same way as the dev copy here.
